name: Fate Weaver
text: When you play me, look at the top 4 cards of your Main Deck. You may reveal a spell with Energy cost :rb_energy_4: or more from among them and draw it. Recycle the rest.

accessibility_text: Riftbound Unit: Fate Weaver. When you play me, look at the top 4 cards of your Main Deck. You may reveal a spell with Energy cost [4] or more from among them and draw it. Recycle the rest.
